title: Redirect signed-out users away from the dashboard
description: This verifies unauthenticated users are prevented from opening a protected dashboard page and are sent to login.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the login page is displayed
Verify a redirect parameter is present for the originally requested page

title: Sign in and continue to the requested protected area
description: This verifies that a user can sign in and reach the protected dashboard route they originally requested.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/inventory
Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user reaches the inventory area
Verify protected dashboard content is displayed

title: Sign in and reach the requested protected page
description: This verifies a user can sign in from the login page and arrive at the protected destination they were trying to access.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the protected destination is displayed
Verify the user can continue into the dashboard area

title: Send authenticated users from login to the dashboard
description: This verifies a signed-in user who opens the login page is routed back to the dashboard instead of staying on the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /login
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Create an estimate from the documents dashboard
description: This verifies that a user can create an estimate and see it appear in the documents list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/documents
Open the estimate creation form
Fill in the required document details
Submit the estimate form
Verify the new estimate is displayed in the documents list
Verify the estimate appears in the estimates area

title: Create a new item master record
description: This verifies a user can create a new item definition and see it added to the item list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/item
Open the create item dialog
Select a category
Fill in the item name field with Automated Test Item
Fill in the item details fields with valid values
Submit the item form
Verify the new item appears in the item list

title: Open the finance dashboard and review records
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open Finance, see the dashboard summary, and browse financial records across the main finance categories.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the finance section
Verify the finance dashboard is displayed
Verify recent financial records are displayed

title: Open the inventory item form and save stock updates
description: This verifies that a user can select an item master record, edit inventory-specific fields, and save a stock update that appears in inventory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/inventory
Open the inventory item form
Select an existing item master record
Edit the stock quantity field
Edit the warehouse field
Save the stock update
Verify the updated inventory record is displayed
Verify the saved stock values are reflected in inventory

title: Convert an estimate into a proposal
description: This verifies that a user can open an estimate and convert it into a proposal that appears in the proposals list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/documents/estimates
Open an estimate
Convert the estimate into a proposal
Verify the new proposal is displayed
Verify the proposal appears in the proposals area

title: Create an invoice from Finance
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can create an invoice and see it reflected in the invoices list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the finance section
Open the invoice form
Fill in the invoice details with valid values
Submit the form
Verify the new invoice appears in the invoices list

title: Edit an existing item master record
description: This verifies a user can update an existing item and see the updated record in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/item
Open an existing item for editing
Update the item fields with valid values
Submit the item form
Verify the updated item appears in the item list

title: Convert a proposal into a quotation
description: This verifies that a user can open a proposal and convert it into a quotation that appears in the quotations list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/documents/proposals
Open a proposal
Convert the proposal into a quotation
Verify the new quotation is displayed
Verify the quotation appears in the quotations area

title: Record a stock movement for an item
description: This verifies that a user can create a stock movement by choosing an item, movement type, quantity, and warehouse details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/inventory
Open a stock movement form
Select an existing item master record
Select a movement type
Fill in a valid quantity
Fill in the warehouse field
Submit the stock movement form
Verify the new stock movement is displayed
Verify the movement appears in the inventory record history

title: Create a payment from Finance
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can create a payment and see it reflected in the payments list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the finance section
Open the payment form
Fill in the payment details with valid values
Submit the form
Verify the new payment appears in the payments list

title: Delete an item from the list
description: This verifies a user can delete an item and see it removed from the item list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/item
Delete an item from the list
Verify the item is removed from the item list

title: Create an expense from Finance
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can create an expense and see it reflected in the expenses list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the finance section
Open the expense form
Fill in the expense details with valid values
Submit the form
Verify the new expense appears in the expenses list

title: Search inventory and open an item detail view
description: This verifies that a user can search inventory items and open a detail view with stock and movement information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/inventory
Search for an inventory item
Open an item detail page
Verify the item detail view is displayed
Verify stock and movement information is displayed

title: Search and filter the item list
description: This verifies a user can narrow the item master list using search and filters and see matching results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/item
Search for an existing item by name
Apply a category filter
Verify the item list is filtered to matching results

title: Navigate from a project to linked documents and back
description: This verifies that a user can open a project, use the documents tab to reach linked documents, and return to the project overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/projects
Open a project detail page
Switch to the documents tab
Open a linked estimate, proposal, or quotation
Return to the project overview
Verify the project overview is displayed
Verify linked document navigation targets are available

title: Open the canonical item module from the legacy item route
description: This verifies the legacy item-master route sends users to the canonical item module.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/item-master
Verify the canonical item module is displayed

title: Browse receivables payables vendors and bank accounts
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can switch between the finance submodules and browse the corresponding record lists.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the finance section
Switch to the receivables view
Switch to the payables view
Switch to the vendors view
Switch to the bank accounts view
Verify the selected finance records are displayed

title: View and close an item detail drawer
description: This verifies a user can open an item detail view to inspect metadata and then close it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/item
Open an item detail view from the list
Verify the item metadata is displayed
Close the item detail view
Verify the item detail view is no longer displayed

title: Review read-only item metadata in inventory
description: This verifies that inventory users can inspect item master details while editing stock records without changing the reference metadata.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/inventory
Open the inventory item form
Select an existing item master record
Verify read-only item metadata is displayed
Verify the item metadata cannot be edited from the inventory form

title: Preview a document from the documents drawer
description: This verifies that a user can open a document drawer and preview the document PDF from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/documents
Open a document drawer
Preview the document PDF
Verify the document preview is displayed
Verify the document drawer remains open

title: Open a finance record drawer and close it
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open a finance record drawer, review its details, and close it again.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the finance section
Open a finance record drawer
Verify the record details are displayed
Close the drawer
Verify the drawer is closed

title: Show invalid email validation on login
description: This verifies the login form blocks an invalid email format and shows inline validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid-email
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Show short password validation on login
description: This verifies the login form blocks a password that is too short and shows inline validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with short
Submit the sign-in form
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Show login validation for missing credentials
description: This verifies that the login form shows validation feedback when required credentials are not provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the login form
Verify login validation errors are displayed

title: Render the login page UI elements
description: Frontend-only check that the login page renders its core UI without any sign-in. Verifies branding, both input fields, and the submit button are present.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify the PEB CRM heading is visible
Verify the email address input is visible
Verify the password input is visible
Verify the Sign in button is visible

title: Verify login input field types
description: Frontend-only check that the email field uses an email input type and the password field is masked. No credentials are submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify the email field is an email input type
Verify the password field is a masked password input type

title: Clear inline validation error while typing
description: Frontend-only check that submitting an empty form shows inline validation, and typing into a field clears that field error. No successful sign-in occurs.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the sign-in form with empty fields
Verify an email validation error is visible
Type a valid email into the email field
Verify the email validation error is no longer visible

title: Show the idle Sign in button label
description: Frontend-only check that the submit button shows the idle Sign in label when the page loads and no submission is in progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify the submit button shows the Sign in label

title: Redirect signed-out users from a protected route to login
description: Frontend-only routing check that visiting a protected route while signed out renders the login page. No sign-in is performed.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/item
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Preserve the redirect target in the login URL
description: Frontend-only routing check that being redirected to login from a protected route preserves the original destination as a redirect parameter. No sign-in is performed.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/documents
Verify the login page is displayed
Verify the login URL contains a redirect parameter for the originally requested page

title: Items search box filters the table rows
description: Frontend-only check that typing a query in the Items page search box filters the data table to matching rows only. No sign-in or sign-out is performed.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/item and wait for the items table to render rows
Type a term that matches at least one item (e.g. part of an item name or code) into the page search box
Verify the table updates to show only rows whose code, name, category, brand, unit, specification, or HSN contains the typed term
Verify the record count shown below the table matches the number of filtered rows

title: Clearing the Items search restores the full list
description: Frontend-only check that removing the search query restores the previously filtered-out rows in the Items data table. No sign-in or sign-out is performed.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/item and note the initial number of records shown
Type a query into the search box so the table filters to fewer rows
Clear the search box completely
Verify the table returns to the initial unfiltered record count

title: Items search with no matches shows the empty state
description: Frontend-only check that a search query with no matches shows the empty-state message instead of stale rows or a blank page. No sign-in or sign-out is performed.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/item
Type a clearly non-matching string such as zzzzz-no-match into the search box
Verify the table shows the No items found empty-state message and the record count is 0

title: Select-all checkbox selects all visible item rows
description: Frontend-only check that the header select-all checkbox selects every row on the current page and that the checkbox reflects the selected state. No sign-in or sign-out is performed.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/item and wait for the table rows to render
Click the header select-all checkbox in the table
Verify every row checkbox on the current page becomes checked and the rows show a selected (highlighted) state
Click the header select-all checkbox again to deselect
Verify all row checkboxes become unchecked

title: Individual row checkbox toggles independently
description: Frontend-only check that toggling a single row checkbox selects only that row and sets the header checkbox to an indeterminate (partial) state. No sign-in or sign-out is performed.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/item and wait for at least two rows to render
Click the checkbox of a single data row without using select-all
Verify only that row checkbox is checked and other row checkboxes remain unchecked
Verify the header select-all checkbox shows an indeterminate (partial) state rather than fully checked

title: Searching after selecting keeps results on a valid page
description: Frontend-only regression check that running a search after navigating pagination shows filtered results from a valid page instead of an empty page (pagination clamp). No sign-in or sign-out is performed.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/item and, if multiple pages exist, move to a later pagination page
Type a search query that narrows results to a single page
Verify the matching rows are visible and the table is not stuck showing an empty page

title: Login accepts any valid-format credentials (temporary access)
description: Authentication is stubbed until real sign-up is built. Verify that any valid email plus a 6+ character password signs in and lands on the dashboard. This case is used as the precondition that unblocks the protected-page tests.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Type test@test.com into the email field and password123 into the password field
Click the Sign in button
Verify the app navigates away from /login to an authenticated dashboard route

title: Category dropdown search field is typeable and filters
description: Regression for the reported bug where the in-dropdown search showed no text caret and could not be typed into. Open the Create New Item modal, open the Category dropdown, and verify the search input is focusable, accepts typed text, and filters the category list.

steps.description: Sign in using test@test.com / password123, then navigate to /dashboard/item
Click the Add Item button to open the Create New Item modal
Click the Category field to open the dropdown, then click the 'Search categories...' input
Verify the search input becomes focused (active element) so a text caret is shown
Type a partial category name such as 'Roof' into the search input
Verify the typed text appears in the input and the category list filters to entries matching 'Roof'

title: Item dropdown search field is typeable and filters
description: Regression for the in-dropdown search caret bug on the Item selector. Open the Create New Item modal, open the Item dropdown, and verify the search input is focusable, accepts typed text, and filters the item list.

steps.description: Sign in using test@test.com / password123, then navigate to /dashboard/item
Click the Add Item button to open the Create New Item modal
Click the Item field to open the dropdown, then click the 'Search items...' input
Verify the search input becomes focused (active element) so a text caret is shown
Type a partial item name into the search input
Verify the typed text appears in the input and the item list filters to matching entries
